review: PrePilot transformed how our team prepares for client meetings. The AI-driven briefings are sharp, accurate, and save us hours every week. Truly indispensable.
name: Sarah M.

review: I was skeptical at first, but PrePilot's research depth blew me away. We walked into our last pitch fully prepared and closed the deal. Game changer.
name: James K.

review: The briefing summaries are concise yet incredibly detailed. Our consultants now spend time on strategy instead of research. PrePilot is worth every penny.
name: Lena T.

review: PrePilot feels like having a brilliant analyst on call 24/7. The context it provides before every meeting helps our team show up sharp and confident.
name: Omar R.

review: Onboarding new hires used to take weeks. With PrePilot, they're client-ready in days. The intelligence it surfaces is exactly what matters.
name: Priya N.

review: I've tried a dozen productivity tools. PrePilot is the first one that actually made a measurable difference in our win rate. Highly recommend to any client-facing team.
name: Daniel W.
